task_completion.description: Verify the taxpayer's personal information is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the StudioTax Personal Information screen or Wizard showing the name 'Marcus Chen-Whitfield', SIN '987 654 321', Province 'Saskatchewan' (or SK), and Marital Status 'Married' with spouse 'Elena'.

task_completion.description: Verify the T5013 Partnership income is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the T5013 slip entry screen showing Box 104 = 165000, Box 128 = 840, Box 130 = 3200, and Box 151 = 4800.

task_completion.description: Verify the T5008 Securities Dispositions are entered with correct Proceeds and Adjusted Cost Base (ACB).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for T5008 slips or Schedule 3 (Capital Gains) showing the dispositions: RY (Proceeds 28400, ACB/Cost 22100), SHOP (Proceeds 15750, ACB/Cost 19200), and ZSP (Proceeds 34500, ACB/Cost 29800).

task_completion.description: Verify RRSP contributions and T5 investment income are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the RRSP contribution screen showing $19,230 for the taxpayer's own RRSP and $12,000 for a Spousal RRSP. Also look for a T5 slip showing Box 13 = 2150.

task_completion.description: Verify the charitable donation and federal political contribution are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Donations and Gifts screen (Schedule 9) showing $5,000 to Saskatchewan Cancer Agency, and the Federal Political Contributions entry showing $650 to the Liberal Party of Canada.

task_completion.description: Verify the completed tax return is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog box or the StudioTax main window title bar showing the file saved as 'marcus_chen_whitfield.24t' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the actual StudioTax 2024 application window being interacted with, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered data into the application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent actively typing or navigating through the StudioTax input fields, wizards, or forms.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts to generate the save file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open showing Python, PowerShell, or bash scripts being used to write or mock the '.24t' file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer: Marcus Chen-Whitfield, Province: SK. Expected output file: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\marcus_chen_whitfield.24t. Key complexities to verify: T5013 multiple line allocation (Box 104: $165,000), T5008 missing ACB calculation (e.g., RY Proceeds $28,400, ACB $22,100), Spousal RRSP ($12,000), and Federal Political Contribution ($650).
